metadata.title: Meezan Roshan Apna Ghar | RDA | Meezan Bank
metadata.description: Meezan Roshan Apna Ghar, being offered under the umbrella of Roshan Digital Account is a Riba free solution to customer’s home financing needs, designed especially for Roshan Digital Account (RDA) holders and Islamic Naya Pakistan Certificate (INPC) holders.

content: Meezan EBiz+ LITE Login Meezan EBiz+ Login EBiz+ LITE Login EBiz+ Login اردو Easy Home Roshan Apna Ghar If you found this page informative, share it now! Facebook LinkedIn X WhatsApp Email Print Roshan Apna Ghar (Self Investment) To facilitate Non-Resident Pakistanis (NRPs) with owning real estate in Pakistan, Roshan Apna Ghar enables NRPs with a Meezan Roshan Digital Account (RDA), allowing them to invest in any residential and commercial property in the country on repatriable basis. Some key features of the arrangement are: • All funds will be invested from Meezan Roshan Digital PKR Account. All payments (token money, down payment/advance, payments made in full, partial, tranches, etc.) must be made from RDA - PKR to fully repatriate the proceeds/disinvestments in future. • A customer can invest in his/her own name or jointly with eligible family members (which includes parents, brother, sister, wife, children—lineal ascendant and descendant only). • Facility for direct payments in favor of seller only. • Full repatriation of proceeds*. The Bank shall conduct proper due diligence and require the customer to submit documents as per the Bank’s internal processes and regulatory guidelines. *In case of disinvestment before three years, the customer can repatriate funds up to the lower amount of sale proceeds or principal investment amount in PKR on the date of the investment, while the differential amount, if any, and any profit/return earned from eligible investments made out of this amount may be repatriated after the expiry of three years from the date of investment. Disclaimer: A customer must successfully register their application with the Bank before making any payment partial, tranches, etc.) to the seller for the purchase of property. Roshan Apna Ghar (Bank Financing) “Get your family a home of their dreams in Pakistan through Roshan Apna Ghar.” Roshan Apna Ghar is a Riba-free solution to customers’ home financing needs, designed especially for RDA holders and Islamic Naya Pakistan Certificate (INPC) holders. It works on the Shariah-compliant concept of Diminishing Musharakah where the Bank and Customer become joint owners in property. The Bank leases its share of property to Customer against periodic rentals. The Customer also purchases Bank’s share of property over the tenure to ultimately become sole owner of the property. Types of Bank Financing: • Lien - For customers who are willing to keep their investment in INPC or RDA deposit funds as lien against their net financing amount as collateral. In this case, no mortgage will be created on the property. • Non-Lien customers who are availing financing facility without cash collateral to invest in Roshan Apna Ghar (MRAG). In this case, an equitable or token mortgage will be required. Key Features Invest directly from your Roshan Digital PKR account (fully digital processing). Easily convert between foreign currencies (USD, EUR, & GBP) and PKR. Maximum financing with attractive pricing options including variable and five-year fixed rates*. A low processing fee of only Rs. 4000 (excluding FED). Flexibility to make partial unit purchases with no early termination profit after first year. For termination within first year, 1% extra profit will be applicable. Optional life Takaful covering death (due to any cause) and accidental/natural disability. Property Takaful (covering the financing amount) absolutely FREE for customers. *Terms and conditions apply. Kindly see the Eligibility Criteria. Eligibility Criteria Citizenship Lien Based All Non-Resident RDA holders having valid NICOP & POC. Non-Lien having valid NICOP Product Category Buyer, Builder, Renovation Segment Salaried Individual Non-salaried individual (individuals earning via their business) Age (Applicant & Co-Applicant) Lien Based Salaried individual : 20 to 65 years. Non-salaried to 65 years. Non-Lien to 65 years. In both types of financing, the age of applicant must not exceed 60 years. However, it may be extended to 65 years, provided applicant justifies that he/ she can make payments even after retirement age. Co-applicant’s age must not exceed 65 years at the time of maturity, incase income of co-applicant is not clubbed. However, if co-applicant’s income is clubbed, then the age criteria same as applicant will be applicable. Financing Range & Tenure Financing Range (Buyer, Builder) Minimum Rs. 500,000/- Maximum No cap Financing Range (Renovation) Lien Based Maximum No cap Non-Lien Rs. 500,000/- Maximum Rs. 10 Million Financing Tenure 3 to 25 Years Co-Applicant Maximum Number of Co-Applicants A maximum of four co-applicants are allowed. Lien Based Co-applicant is not mandatory in this case. However, if opted, he/she will be an immediate family member like a spouse, parent, adult sibling and/or children. Further, applicant also has an option of appointing a “nominee” to carry out any assignment on his/her behalf, having no legal obligations on nominee. Non-Lien Based Co-applicant is mandatory and an immediate family member, sibling and/or children. At least one should be permanently living in Pakistan. Co-applicant (NRP) for Income Clubbing Lien Based 100% Co-applicant income will be clubbed. Non-Lien income will be clubbed in case of spouse. 75% in case of other than spouse. For the purpose of income clubbing, only a non-resident Pakistanis can be considered. Net Monthly Income Lien Based There will be no minimum income criteria. Non-Lien no minimum income criteria however, maximum 50% DBR will be kept while providing financing facility. Employment Tenure Lien Based Minimum overall employment / business tenure will be one year. Non-Lien tenure will be two years Creation of Mortgage Lien Based No requirement of mortgage - equitable or registered Non-Lien Based Equitable mortgage with token registered mortgage Physical Presence Lien Based Not required, as the property can be transferred in the name of the ex-parte as per the customer's request. The customer’s nominee may witness the transaction to ensure that the deed/sale deed is duly executed and registered in his/her name. The customer shall provide original last title deed for the Bank’s records. Non-Lien Based Either physical presence or Power of Attorney (POA) is required to execute and collect the title documents and to create a charge in favor of the Bank. (Download Power of Attorney) Product Profit Rates Variable Profit Rates Segment Variable Rate* Re-pricing*** (Annual) Non Lien Based Salaried Individual Fixed – 1 year K* + 1.5% p.a. 1 Year K* +1.5%p.a. Non-Salaried individual Based Salaried individual 1 year K* 1 Year K* p.a. Non-Salaried individual Fixed Profit Rates Segment Fixed Rate** 5 Years Re-pricing*** (After 5 Years) Based Salaried Individual 5 Years PKRV****+1.5% (Fixed Rate for First 5 years, after which Fixed rate/variable rate will apply) 5 year PKRV**** + 1.5% OR 1 Year + 1.5% p.a. Based Salaried individual 5 Years PKRV**** 5 year PKRV**** p.a. Non-Salaried individual *For first year fixed rate, ‘K’ denotes KIBOR (Karachi Interbank Offer Rate), announced on 1st working day of each calendar month. **Pricing will be reevaluated after every six months or any change in discount rate announced by SBP ***KIBOR shall mean 12 –month of each calendar month immediately preceding the end of (transaction)the year. ****PKRV = Pakistan Revaluation Rate Note: The applicant will have the option of both variable and fixed rate on completion of the 5 years fixed rate term. Strategic Alliance with Naya Nazimabad - Easy Home Off-Plan Financing Meezan Bank, Pakistan’s first and largest Islamic bank, introduces Easy Home for Naya Nazimabad Projects — a Shariah-compliant home financing facility offering up to 70% financing for under-construction apartments. This unique solution enables you to finance your future home through a convenient, hassle-free and 100% Halal structure, backed by affordable profit rates. Through our partnership with Naya Nazimabad – one of Karachi’s leading master-planned communities – you now have the opportunity to own a home in a modern, secure and well-developed neighborhood, supported by Meezan Bank’s trusted Islamic financing model. The development features thoughtfully designed 4-bedroom apartments with modern amenities, offering an elevated lifestyle within a vibrant gated community. This exclusive financing facility is currently available only for Naya Nazimabad – Globe Residency FL-5. For detailed project information, unit availability, and apartment features, please visit: Naya Nazimabad Apartments Note: In case any developer / builder intends to enlist their project with Meezan Bank, kindly contact the Bank at the following email id: info.rag@meezanbank.com Products Easy Buyer Choose it and get ready to move in! Easy Builder For that special home you want to build! Easy Renovate Make your home even better or just repair it! Processing Charges Type of Charges Salaried & Businessmen Processing Charges PKR 4,000 FED on Processing Charges@ 16%** PKR 640 Legal Report Charges At Actual Property Valuation Charges At Actual Documentation charges are exclusive of above mentioned charges and will be obtained at actual the time of signing of Musharakah Agreement according to the limits of financing. ** Subject to applicable Government Taxes. RDA Customer Application Form - Apply Now FAQs Documents Checklist In case of any query, contact the Bank representative email id: info.rag@meezanbank.com Contact our Dedicated Representatives Mr. Muhammad Habib Asghar (Relationship Manager) Cell No: 0301-1189256 E-mail: habib.asghar@meezanbank.com Address: Gulberg Branch, 60 Main Boulevard Gulberg - II, Lahore Dir. No. 042-35757435-6 PABX: 042-35879870-2 Ext: 8219 Mr. Arsalan Saeed Manager) Cell No: 0304-1927533 E-mail: arsalan.saeed@meezanbank.com Address: 3rd Floor, Plot No. 42C, 22nd East Street Phase I, DHA, Karachi PABX: 021-38103500, 37133500 Ext: 4034 Mr. Tasswar Hussain Manager) Cell No: 0304-0920597 E-mail: tasswar.hussain@meezanbank.com PABX: 042-35879870-2 Ext: 8218 Mr. Muhammad Iqbal Manager) Cell No: 0304-0920598 E-mail: m.iqbal@meezanbank.com Address: 2nd Floor, Meezan Tower , New Blue Area, Islamabad. Form submitted successfully Thank you for contacting us! Our representative will call you within 2 working days. Do you have another query? Feel free to re-fill the form and submit it again Get Contacted by a Roshan Apna Ghar Representative Fill out the form below and you will be contacted by a Meezan Bank representative. MeezanGPT Assalam o Alaikum! How can I be of service to you today? By using this AI assistant, you acknowledge and agree that... read more Copy link ✓ Thanks for sharing!
